---
title: "Get all vendors"
description: "Retrieve a paginated list of all vendors"
api: "GET /vendor"
---


## Query Parameters

<ParamField query="page" type="object">
  Pagination parameters
</ParamField>

## Example Response

```json
{
  "vendors": [{
    "Id": "1234",
    "Name": "John Smith",
    "Email": "john.smith@mailsac.com",
    "Is_Company": false
  }],
  "pagination": { "total": 1, "page_size": 10, "page": 0 }
}
```
